prompt: You are selecting which library images best illustrate a WordPress blog post, using only each image's keyword tags.
Intended image themes (consider these alongside the tags): {IMAGE_THEMES}
Candidate images (each numbered, followed by its keyword tags):
Task: pick the images whose tags are contextually relevant to the post's subject matter and the image themes.
Match on meaning, not just exact words: ignore common/stop words (a, the, and, then, of, to, etc.), allow
singular/plural and partial-word matches, and prefer images whose tags clearly relate to the post topic.
Order your selection best-first. If nothing is relevant, return an empty array.
Return ONLY a JSON array of the selected image numbers, best first, e.g. [3, 1, 7]. No other text.
